summary: Diff adds a frontend “Site Deleted” screen and client-side gating/disablement, plus backend introduction of an `isSiteDeleted` flag and per-method `requireSiteNotDeleted()` checks in some methods. However, the diff evidence is insufficient to confirm the backend implements a complete irreversible wipe (including user profiles and authorized staff) and consistent rejection across *all* existing endpoints after deletion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend implements an irreversible admin/owner-only “Delete everything” action that wipes all stored application data (leads, user profiles, uploaded rate card, authorized staff list) and marks the site as deleted persistently; re-running delete yields a clear already-deleted error/no-op.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend includes a delete flow hook and UI, but the backend diff excerpt does not show any delete/wipe method implementation, nor does it show state-wipe logic for user profiles or authorized staff (both are declared as `let` maps in the shown snippet, making a full reset unclear). Persistence across upgrades (stable storage) and the already-deleted behavior are also not evidenced in the shown backend excerpt.

missing_requirements.requirement: All existing backend update/query methods that expose site functionality are rejected with a consistent error when the site is deleted, except for a lightweight anonymous detection mechanism.
missing_requirements.reason: Only some backend methods in the truncated `backend/main.mo` excerpt show `requireSiteNotDeleted();`. The diff does not provide evidence that *all* existing endpoints are guarded, nor that a single consistent/stable deleted-state error is used across all of them.

hallucinated_features.description: Brand/theme overhaul and Tailwind/CSS token changes (OKLCH warm cab-service theme, custom fonts).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-1/2/3; unrelated to delete/disable behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: New/expanded pricing UI section and related rate card page changes.
Booking form behavior change to allow anonymous submissions in customer mode.
Leads page enhancements (show createdBy principal with copy, polling/notifications, authorization gating refinements).
Download utility and share/canonical URL/deep-link utilities enhancements.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; unrelated to delete/disable requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Site Deleted screen includes a hard-coded support phone contact block.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-2; extra user-facing content beyond dedicated deleted screen requirement.
